artefacts.name: Incident Response Plan v1.8
artefacts.content_summary: Documented incident response plan covering identification, containment, eradication, recovery, and lessons learned. Includes GDPR breach notification procedures with 72-hour timeline.

artefacts.name: Incident Log – 2025/2026
artefacts.content_summary: Log of 7 security incidents recorded in the past 12 months. All incidents were classified, investigated, and closed. Average response time: 4.2 hours.

notes: Synthetic evidence. Plan was last tested via tabletop exercise in November 2025.
